channel.title: Vagrant on Felipe Castro
channel.description: Recent content in Vagrant on Felipe Castro

item.title: Vagrant Setup for macOS with Apple Chips
item.description: Hey guys! In this short post, we will set up a simple environment to create VMs on macOS with Apple chips (M1/M2/M3 or newer) using Vagrant.
item.content:encoded:
Hey guys!

In this short post, we will set up a simple environment to create VMs on macOS with Apple chips (M1/M2/M3 or newer) using Vagrant.
